api_key.description: PandaDoc API key, sent as the Authorization header with an 'API-Key ' prefix. Never logged.

base_url.description: PandaDoc API root URL override for tests or proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.

document_id.description: Optional document_id used by detail streams.

task_id.description: Optional task_id used by detail streams.

id.description: Optional id used by detail streams.

section_id.description: Optional section_id used by detail streams.

upload_id.description: Optional upload_id used by detail streams.

attachment_id.description: Optional attachment_id used by detail streams.

user_id.description: Optional user_id used by detail streams.

session_request_id.description: Optional session_request_id used by detail streams.

item_uuid.description: Optional item_uuid used by detail streams.

template_id.description: Optional template_id used by detail streams.
